customrecordtype.description: Stores Amazon SP-API credentials and connector settings for each Amazon marketplace.

customrecordcustomfield.description: Amazon Marketplace (e.g., US, CA, UK, DE)
customrecordcustomfield.label: Marketplace

customrecordcustomfield.description: Amazon Seller/Merchant ID
customrecordcustomfield.label: Amazon Seller ID

customrecordcustomfield.description: Amazon SP-API LWA Client ID
customrecordcustomfield.label: SP-API Client ID

customrecordcustomfield.description: Amazon SP-API LWA Client Secret (encrypted at rest)
customrecordcustomfield.label: SP-API Client Secret

customrecordcustomfield.description: Amazon SP-API LWA Refresh Token (encrypted at rest)
customrecordcustomfield.label: SP-API Refresh Token

customrecordcustomfield.description: Amazon SP-API regional endpoint URL
customrecordcustomfield.label: SP-API Endpoint

customrecordcustomfield.description: Amazon Marketplace ID (e.g., ATVPDKIKX0DER for US)
customrecordcustomfield.label: Marketplace ID

customrecordcustomfield.description: Default NetSuite inventory location for this marketplace
customrecordcustomfield.label: Default Warehouse Location

customrecordcustomfield.description: Timestamp of the last successful order sync
customrecordcustomfield.label: Last Order Sync

customrecordcustomfield.description: Timestamp of the last successful inventory sync
customrecordcustomfield.label: Last Inventory Sync

customrecordcustomfield.description: Timestamp of the last successful settlement sync
customrecordcustomfield.label: Last Settlement Sync

customrecordcustomfield.description: Default payment method internal ID for Amazon orders
customrecordcustomfield.label: Payment Method

customrecordcustomfield.description: Generic customer record for Amazon marketplace orders
customrecordcustomfield.label: Default Amazon Customer

customrecordcustomfield.description: Create Sales Orders or Cash Sales from Amazon orders
customrecordcustomfield.label: Order Type

customrecordcustomfield.description: Custom form ID to use for Sales Orders
customrecordcustomfield.label: Sales Order Custom Form

customrecordcustomfield.description: Custom form ID to use for Cash Sales
customrecordcustomfield.label: Cash Sale Custom Form

customrecordcustomfield.description: Bank account for Amazon settlement deposits
customrecordcustomfield.label: Settlement Bank Account

customrecordcustomfield.description: Expense account for Amazon selling fees
customrecordcustomfield.label: Selling Fee Expense Account

customrecordcustomfield.description: Expense account for FBA fulfillment fees
customrecordcustomfield.label: FBA Fee Expense Account

customrecordcustomfield.description: Service/non-inventory item for Amazon shipping charges on orders
customrecordcustomfield.label: Shipping Charge Item

customrecordcustomfield.description: Discount item for Amazon promotional discounts
customrecordcustomfield.label: Discount Item

customrecordcustomfield.description: Import Amazon FBA (Fulfilled by Amazon) orders into NetSuite
customrecordcustomfield.label: Import FBA Orders

customrecordcustomfield.description: NetSuite location representing Amazon FBA warehouses
customrecordcustomfield.label: FBA Warehouse Location

customrecordcustomfield.description: Customer record for FBA orders (if different from MFN customer)
customrecordcustomfield.label: FBA Customer

customrecordcustomfield.description: Customer record for Amazon B2B (Business) orders
customrecordcustomfield.label: B2B Customer

customrecordcustomfield.description: Comma-separated list of additional marketplace IDs for this region
customrecordcustomfield.label: Additional Marketplace IDs

customrecordcustomfield.description: Automatically create Credit Memos when processing Amazon returns
customrecordcustomfield.label: Auto-Create Credit Memos

customrecordcustomfield.description: Automatically create Deposit records from settlement data
customrecordcustomfield.label: Auto-Create Deposits

customrecordcustomfield.description: Maximum number of retry attempts for failed operations
customrecordcustomfield.label: Max Retry Attempts

customrecordcustomfield.description: Initial delay between retry attempts (doubles each retry)
customrecordcustomfield.label: Retry Delay (Minutes)

customrecordcustomfield.description: Send email notifications when sync errors occur
customrecordcustomfield.label: Notify on Errors

customrecordcustomfield.description: Email address for sync notifications and alerts
customrecordcustomfield.label: Notification Email

customrecordcustomfield.description: Send email summary after each sync cycle completes
customrecordcustomfield.label: Notify on Sync Complete

customrecordcustomfield.description: How frequently to poll for new Amazon orders
customrecordcustomfield.label: Order Sync Interval (Minutes)

customrecordcustomfield.description: How frequently to push inventory levels to Amazon
customrecordcustomfield.label: Inventory Sync Interval (Minutes)

customrecordcustomfield.description: How frequently to fetch settlement reports
customrecordcustomfield.label: Settlement Sync Interval (Minutes)

customrecordcustomfield.description: How frequently to fetch return reports
customrecordcustomfield.label: Return Sync Interval (Minutes)

customrecordcustomfield.description: How frequently to push pricing updates to Amazon
customrecordcustomfield.label: Pricing Sync Interval (Minutes)

customrecordcustomfield.description: How frequently to sync catalog/listings from Amazon
customrecordcustomfield.label: Catalog Sync Interval (Minutes)

customrecordcustomfield.description: Number of days to retain integration logs before archival
customrecordcustomfield.label: Log Retention Days

customrecordcustomfield.description: Pull FBA inventory levels from Amazon into NetSuite
customrecordcustomfield.label: FBA Inventory Sync Enabled

customrecordcustomfield.description: Sync order cancellations from Amazon and close NetSuite orders
customrecordcustomfield.label: Cancellation Sync Enabled

customrecordcustomfield.description: Action to take on cancelled orders: CLOSE or VOID
customrecordcustomfield.label: Cancellation Action

customrecordcustomfield.description: Default GL account for CAD settlement fees when no charge mapping is found
customrecordcustomfield.label: Default Fee Account (CAD)

customrecordcustomfield.description: Default GL account for MXN settlement fees when no charge mapping is found
customrecordcustomfield.label: Default Fee Account (MXN)

customrecordcustomfield.description: GL account for customer refund payments (replaces hardcoded account 115)
customrecordcustomfield.label: Refund Payment Account

customrecordcustomfield.description: Custom invoice form to use for settlement invoices (optional)
customrecordcustomfield.label: Settlement Invoice Form

customrecordcustomfield.description: When enabled, uses Amazon Charge Account Map records to dynamically map charge descriptions to GL accounts for journal entries
customrecordcustomfield.label: Use Charge Account Mapping
